title: Avatar 3 to Rule Over Christmas Box Office; Anaconda to Top Fellow New Holiday Releases
text: Sony's disaster comedy Anaconda is expected to lead new holiday releases during the Christmas weekend. The film, starring Jack Black and Paul Rudd, is projected to earn approximately $20 million from 3,400 theaters between Christmas Thursday and Sunday. The movie had a production budget of $45 million. It's described as a meta-reboot following best friends who travel to the jungle to pursue their childhood dream of remaking their all-time favorite movie (you guessed it!) 1997's Anaconda. The plot takes an unexpected turn when the situation mirrors the film itself, as an actual anaconda begins hunting the characters. For context, Anaconda ranks second among new holiday releases. Meanwhile, Avatar: Fire and Ash is projected to dominate the overall box office with significantly higher earnings of $55-65 million for the traditional weekend.
